description: CPU utilization exceeds 80 percent, runaway process consuming excessive resources on the server
symptoms: high cpu, process freeze, application unresponsive, cpu spike, server slow, 100 percent cpu, processor maxed out

description: Memory utilization climbing continuously, possible memory leak in application process
symptoms: memory full, oom, out of memory, swap usage high, ram exhausted, memory leak, heap overflow

description: Disk utilization exceeds 80 percent, storage space running out on root volume
symptoms: disk full, no space left, storage exhausted, cannot write files, disk usage high, filesystem full

description: Network connections timing out, service unreachable, high network latency detected
symptoms: network timeout, connection refused, service unreachable, high latency, packet loss, network error

description: Application process has crashed or stopped responding, service is down
symptoms: process crashed, application down, service stopped, process not running, app failure, crash
